title: Creating a Line Plot from Data

steps.explanation: Sort or tally the data first.

steps.instruction: Set up a number line from 3 to 5.
steps.explanation: Include all values that appear in the data.

steps.instruction: Put one X above the number for each data point.
steps.work: 3: XXX (3 Xs), 4: XXX (3 Xs), 5: XX (2 Xs)
steps.explanation: Stack Xs vertically above each number.

steps.work: 3 and 4 are tied with 3 Xs each.
steps.explanation: The tallest column(s) of Xs show the most common value(s).

title: Reading a Line Plot to Find the Total

steps.instruction: Count the Xs above each number.
steps.work: Value 2: 1 X, Value 3: 4 Xs, Value 4: 2 Xs, Value 5: 3 Xs
steps.explanation: Each X is one data point.

steps.instruction: Multiply each value by its frequency and add.
steps.explanation: The sum of all values is 37.
